text:
The Casino King (, Kajino-ō) is a non-player character (NPC) of the Greed Island game, who gambles with players that dare challenge him in Dorias. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 151 

Appearance

The Casino King wears his hair in a massive pompadour style haircut and dresses in a plain dress shirt, pants, and shoes. 

Personality

The Casino King portrayed himself as a cool and confident gambler, until Killua beat him. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

In the casino area at Dorias, Killua challenges the Casino King to a game of Poker. The latter disparages Killua for challenging him; however, thanks to a successful roll on the Risky Dice, Killua beats the Casino King with a "Broadway Straight," thereby winning the "Fledgling Gambler" card. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

The Casino King is most likely a reference to Mahjong Hishō-den: Naki no Ryūs protagonist—Ryuu or Crying Dragon.

Anime and Manga Differences

The Casino King does not appear in the 2011 anime adaptation and seems to have been replaced by a poker dealer in the 1999 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 81 (1999)
